commands.command: vp install -g testnpm2@1.0.0 # should prepare global outdated package

commands: vp outdated definitely-not-installed-vite-plus-snap-pkg -g --format json # should support empty global json output
vp outdated testnpm2 -g --format json # should support global json output
vp outdated testnpm2 -g --format list --concurrency 5 # should support global list output
